findings.message: CLAUDE.md has no YAML frontmatter (name, description). This is expected for project instruction files but the file was included in the artifact list.

Runtime dependencies use '>=' floor constraints (pydantic>=2.0, pdfplumber>=0.10, pyyaml>=6.0.3) rather than exact version pins. Future incompatible major versions could silently break tax calculations.

skills/e-tax/SKILL.md exceeds the 25k-token read limit; audit coverage limited to first ~150 lines. Full scoring is estimated. Recommend splitting into orchestration SKILL.md plus per-section sub-skill files.

Spoofs navigator.platform, navigator.userAgent, navigator.userAgentData, navigator.webdriver and patches server-baked OS-detection JS functions to present Windows identity. Purpose: enable Linux users to access Japan NTA e-Tax filing site that discriminates against non-Windows OSes. All manipulations are in-browser client-side; no network exfiltration.
'適切に設定されているか' (appropriately set) used for home-office business ratio check. Does not specify how to verify appropriateness.
'妥当か' (reasonable/appropriate) used as a vague qualifier for account balance review criteria. Ambiguous — does not specify what constitutes an abnormal balance.
Second instance of '妥当か' (reasonable/appropriate) used as a vague qualifier for expense account review. Does not specify what constitutes an abnormal expense.

Skill instructs 'uv tool install git+https://github.com/kazukinagata/shinkoku' — a runtime install from a git URL with no version pin. Git URL installs bypass package registry integrity guarantees and resolve to HEAD at install time.
'網羅的に' (comprehensively) used when instructing Claude to list all applicable deductions. Vague — does not specify the enumeration order or completeness criteria.

skills/tax-advisor/SKILL.md references files under 'reference/' (singular) while all other skills use 'references/' (plural). Both directories exist and all paths resolve correctly, so this is a naming inconsistency rather than a broken reference.
CLAUDE.md has no YAML frontmatter (name, description). This is expected for project instruction files but the file was included in the artifact list.

skills/e-tax/SKILL.md exceeds the 25k-token read limit; audit coverage limited to first ~150 lines. Full scoring is estimated. Recommend splitting into orchestration SKILL.md plus per-section sub-skill files.
'妥当か' (reasonable/appropriate) used as a vague qualifier for account balance review criteria. Ambiguous — does not specify what constitutes an abnormal balance.
Second instance of '妥当か' (reasonable/appropriate) used as a vague qualifier for expense account review. Does not specify what constitutes an abnormal expense.
'適切に設定されているか' (appropriately set) used for home-office business ratio check. Does not specify how to verify appropriateness.
'網羅的に' (comprehensively) used when instructing Claude to list all applicable deductions. Vague — does not specify the enumeration order or completeness criteria.

Skill instructs 'uv tool install git+https://github.com/kazukinagata/shinkoku' — a runtime install from a git URL with no version pin. Git URL installs bypass package registry integrity guarantees and resolve to HEAD at install time.

Spoofs navigator.platform, navigator.userAgent, navigator.userAgentData, navigator.webdriver and patches server-baked OS-detection JS functions to present Windows identity. Purpose: enable Linux users to access Japan NTA e-Tax filing site that discriminates against non-Windows OSes. All manipulations are in-browser client-side; no network exfiltration.

Runtime dependencies use '>=' floor constraints (pydantic>=2.0, pdfplumber>=0.10, pyyaml>=6.0.3) rather than exact version pins. Future incompatible major versions could silently break tax calculations.

skills/tax-advisor/SKILL.md references files under 'reference/' (singular) while all other skills use 'references/' (plural). Both directories exist and all paths resolve correctly, so this is a naming inconsistency rather than a broken reference.
